summary: Add a docstring to _prepare_sound_latents explaining that sp_video_shape triggers sequence-parallelism padding, rounding up sound frames and that extra frames are trimmed on decode due to non-bit-exact SP output.

Add an integration test in TestForwardRouting that exercises the SP-padding path by monkeypatching get_ulysses_parallel_world_size=2 and verifying that the padded sound latent length is passed to the transformer.
